sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount FLOAT, category VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount, category) VALUES (1, 100.0, 'Electronics'), (2, 150.0, 'Furniture'), (3, 200.0, 'Electronics');
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE category = 'Electronics';
SELECT category, regr_syy(amount, id) AS variance FROM sales GROUP BY category;
